testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.text: An absolutely magical experience. The forest views from our room were breathtaking, and the staff made us feel like family.

testimonials.name: Rahul Verma
testimonials.text: Perfect weekend getaway. The spa treatments were world-class, and the food was exceptional. Can't wait to return!

testimonials.name: Ananya Patel
testimonials.text: DurgBhumi Resort is a hidden gem. The nature trails, the peaceful ambiance, and the luxury rooms exceeded all expectations.
